title: LeadAnyMob
description: Allows you to attach leads to any living thing.
body:
# Lead Any Mob
You will be able to attach leads to all kinds of creatures, such as villagers, zombies, and bats.

![screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/amu0/LeadAnyMob/1.0.0/images/screenshot.png)

## Permission
- `leadanymob.use`
  - Allow use of this plugin
  - All players have this permission by default
